question_text: Which statement best describes the arrangement of particles in a solid?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles are tightly packed in a fixed, regular pattern

options.label: B
options.text: Particles are spread far apart with gaps between them

options.label: C
options.text: Particles move freely and randomly throughout the material

options.label: D
options.text: Particles are loosely arranged and can easily be rearranged

explanation: In solids, particles are held in fixed positions by strong forces and vibrate in place. This tight, regular arrangement is why solids have a definite shape and volume that doesn't change easily.
